ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test execution (e.g., passed, failed, skipped) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test execution started */,
  "stop_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test execution stopped */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the test execution in milliseconds */,
  "parent_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent suite if applicable */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suite the test execution belongs to */,
  "sub_suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-suite the test execution belongs to */,
  "test_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test class the test execution belongs to */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Name of the test method being executed */,
  "name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the test execution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test execution */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the test was executed */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release version being tested */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test execution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test execution was last updated */,
  "error_details" TEXT /* Detailed error messages when the test fails */,
  "test_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test plan the execution is part of */,
  "ci_cd_build_id" TEXT /* CI/CD build ID associated with the test execution */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing test data or parameters used during the test execution */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better filtering and searching */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_parent_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_suite_id") REFERENCES suites ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_sub_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_suite_id") REFERENCES sub_suites ("sub_suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES suites ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_test_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_class_id") REFERENCES test_classes ("test_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_executions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test suite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test suite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test suite was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the suite is currently active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_suites" (
  "sub_suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-suite */,
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suite the sub-suite belongs to */,
  "sub_suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-suite */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sub-suite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-suite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sub-suite was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sub-suite is currently active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_suites_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("suite_id") REFERENCES suites ("suite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_classes" (
  "test_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the test class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test class */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test class was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test class is currently active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test method */,
  "test_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test class the method belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test method was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test method is currently active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_methods_test_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_class_id") REFERENCES test_classes ("test_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_methods_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test environment was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the environment is currently active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software release */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the release was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is currently active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Test Engineer, QA Manager, Developer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test execution the result belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., passed, failed, skipped) */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing detailed results of the test */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test result was last updated */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing test data or parameters used during the test execution */,
  "logs" TEXT /* Logs generated during the test execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the test plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test plan */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release the test plan is associated with */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test plan was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test plan is currently active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plan_executions" (
  "plan_execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan execution */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test plan being executed */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test execution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test plan execution (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test plan execution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test plan execution was last updated */,
  "ci_cd_build_id" TEXT /* CI/CD build ID associated with the test plan execution */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for better organization and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plan_executions_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_executions ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plan_executions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES test_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environment_details" (
  "environment_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment detail */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test environment */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the environment detail */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the environment detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment detail was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the environment detail is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environment_details_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_method_details" (
  "method_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method detail */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test method */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the method detail */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the method detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method detail was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method detail is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_method_details_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id")
)
